title: Fan Translation of Evangelion 2 Shinseiki Evangelion 2 on PS2 PSP
display_title: Fan Translation of Evangelion 2 Shinseiki Evangelion 2 on PS2 PSP
wikitext:
[]: Fan Translation of Evangelion 2/Shinseiki Evangelion 2 on PS2/PSP?             Quote Post by WiseUp » Sun Mar 30, 2025 8:24 pm Hey all, Does anyone know of a fan translation for the 2003 Neon Genesis PS2/PSP game? As far as I know the game is only in Japanese and hasn't been translated in the 22 years since its release. The game is mostly all in Kanji so Google Translate has issues with properly translating it at all. I read some rumors about a fan translation, but are these true? If there is one is it public or is it still in development? Frankly, I really (emphasis here) want to play the game and I of course don't speak Japanese. Any help is appreciated!

[]: Re: Fan Translation of Evangelion 2/Shinseiki Evangelion 2 on PS2/PSP?             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Mon Mar 31, 2025 1:52 am There's a thread in this very sub-forum about the fan translation. It's still in development and is unreleased atm.

[]: Re: Fan Translation of Evangelion 2/Shinseiki Evangelion 2 on PS2/PSP?             Quote Post by WiseUp » Mon Mar 31, 2025 11:46 am Axx°N N. wrote: There's a thread in this very sub-forum about the fan translation. It's still in development and is unreleased atm.
